ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "code" TEXT /* Station code (e.g., HPT, TNGL) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographic latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographic longitude of the station */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the station */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the station */,
  "facilities" TEXT /* List of facilities available at the station (e.g., parking, Wi-Fi, ATMs) */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the station */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the station information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trains" (
  "train_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each train */,
  "train_name" TEXT /* Name of the train */,
  "train_number" INTEGER /* Train number */,
  "train_type" TEXT /* Type of train (e.g., express, local) */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Name of the train operator */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the train */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the train information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time from the station */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time at the station */,
  "halt_duration" TEXT /* Halt duration at the station */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the schedule */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule (e.g., on-time, delayed, cancelled) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_schedules" (
  "station_schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station schedule */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schedule */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "platform_number" INTEGER /* Platform number at the station */,
  "arrival_status" TEXT /* Status of the arrival (e.g., on-time, delayed) */,
  "departure_status" TEXT /* Status of the departure (e.g., on-time, delayed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the station schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_schedules_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_schedules_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting station */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ending station */,
  "distance" TEXT /* Total distance of the route in kilometers */,
  "estimated_travel_time" TEXT /* Estimated travel time for the route */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the route information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_trains" (
  "route_train_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route train */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the train on the route (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the route train information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_train_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_trains_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_trains_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "passenger_name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the passenger */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the passenger */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the passenger information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)
